response.original_title: Play Rock Guitar with Wolf Marshall
response.overview: Top player Wolf Marshall introduces you to every aspect of the electric guitar - stringing, tuning, and connecting up to an amplifier.  This great video gets you playing right away. Includes detailed, easy-to-follow advice and instruction on how to play rock and pop.  Even if you have no knowledge of music, and have never before so much as held a guitar, you'll find everything you need here in this remarkable video.
response.title: Play Rock Guitar with Wolf Marshall
